_doc: Onslaught (ONS) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/ons.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 110C / 110U / 110R / 0M. Collation: sequential (US); striped (Belgian). Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Occasional foil (1:70) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Large set. Printed in USA (sequential) and Belgium. 36 packs per box. No basic land or ad card in booster. Tournament packs (30 lands, 3 rares, 10 uncommons, 32 commons) described but not modelled.
